channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Context Management
channel.description: Latest Context Management news in Context Engineering

item.title: LinearARD: Linear-Memory Attention Distillation for RoPE Restoration
item.description: arXiv:2604.00004v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The extension of context windows in Large Language Models is typically facilitated by scaling positional encodings followed by lightweight Continual Pre-Training (CPT). While effective for processing long sequences, this paradigm often disrupts origin...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, memory, model, context, large language model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Improvisational Games as a Benchmark for Social Intelligence of AI Agents: The Case of Connections
item.description: arXiv:2604.00284v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We formally introduce a improvisational wordplay game called Connections to explore reasoning capabilities of AI agents. Playing Connections combines skills in knowledge retrieval, summarization and awareness of cognitive states of other agents. We sh...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, model, summarization, reasoning, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Temporal Memory for Resource-Constrained Agents: Continual Learning via Stochastic Compress-Add-Smooth
item.description: arXiv:2604.00067v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: An agent that operates sequentially must incorporate new experience without forgetting old experience, under a fixed memory budget. We propose a framework in which memory is not a parameter vector but a stochastic process: a Bridge Diffusion on a repl...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, compression, vector, model, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: OpenViking - OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
item.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)
